# Beaver Dam Chamber & Visitor Center

> The community Visitor Center and seat at the table for 400+ Beaver Dam, Wisconsin businesses since 1972. Hometown connection on the lake — for visitors planning a weekend, families considering a move, and businesses joining the local network.

## Quick facts

- **Location**: 127 S. Spring St., Beaver Dam, WI 53916
- **Phone**: (920) 887-8879
- **Hours**: Monday – Friday, 8:30 am – 4:30 pm
- **Founded**: 1972
- **Membership**: 400+ local businesses
- **Service area**: City of Beaver Dam and Dodge County, Wisconsin
- **Annual events**: ~87 (festivals, parades, mixers, awards)

## Primary purpose

The Beaver Dam Chamber & Visitor Center serves three audiences:

1. **Visitors and tourists** — maps, lodging, the printed Community Guide, lake-day recommendations, and a friendly hello.
2. **Residents (current and prospective)** — schools, neighborhoods, real estate references, and a Newcomer Welcome program.
3. **Local businesses** — networking events, member directory listing, marketing exposure, group insurance, advocacy at city/county/state level, and flagship programs (Leadership Beaver Dam, the Young Professional Network, the Manufacturing Business Alliance).

## Signature events

- **Beaver Bar Crawl** — Saturday in late April, downtown.
- **Wisconsin Arts & Peony Festival** — June, three-day weekend.
- **Taste of Wisconsin Beer, Cheese & Wine Fest** — Saturday in late June.
- **Annual Chamber Golf Outing** — Monday in late June, Old Hickory Golf Course.
- **Pepper Festival** — flagship festival in July at Swan Park.
- **Corn Roast** — community tradition in fall.
- **Annual Awards Gala** — September; Member of the Year, 5 Under 40, Innovation, and Emerging Leader awards.

## Site map

- [Home](https://beaverdamchamber.com/): chamber overview, video, featured events, discover bento.
- [About the Chamber](https://beaverdamchamber.com/about/): mission, what we do, leadership, programs overview.
- [Mission & Values](https://beaverdamchamber.com/about/mission-values/)
- [Leadership & Ambassadors](https://beaverdamchamber.com/about/leadership/)
- [Contact](https://beaverdamchamber.com/contact/): form, address, phone, hours, map.
- [Find a Business](https://beaverdamchamber.com/find-a-business/): searchable member directory across 12 categories.
- [Community Events](https://beaverdamchamber.com/community-events/): full calendar (Membo / ChamberMaster powered).
- [Live in Beaver Dam](https://beaverdamchamber.com/live-in-beaver-dam/): why move here, schools, real estate, neighborhoods.
- [Downtown](https://beaverdamchamber.com/downtown/): walkable shops, cafés, gazebo on the square.
- [Volunteer](https://beaverdamchamber.com/volunteer/): ambassador program and event volunteering.
- [Latest News](https://beaverdamchamber.com/news/): chamber announcements and member news.
